test_patch:
diff --git a/internal/config/analytics_test.go b/internal/config/analytics_test.go
index c8432aa6..51577ad6 100644
--- a/internal/config/analytics_test.go
+++ b/internal/config/analytics_test.go
@@ -27,3 +27,16 @@ func TestAnalyticsClickhouseConfiguration(t *testing.T) {
 	assert.ErrorContains(t, err, "parse dsn address failed")
 
 }
+
+func TestAnalyticsStorageConfigString(t *testing.T) {
+	cfg := AnalyticsStorageConfig{
+		Clickhouse: ClickhouseConfig{
+			Enabled: true,
+		},
+	}
+
+	assert.Equal(t, "ClickHouse", cfg.String())
+
+	cfg.Clickhouse.Enabled = false
+	assert.Empty(t, cfg.String())
+}
diff --git a/internal/telemetry/telemetry_test.go b/internal/telemetry/telemetry_test.go
index 265c047b..68be6a98 100644
--- a/internal/telemetry/telemetry_test.go
+++ b/internal/telemetry/telemetry_test.go
@@ -464,7 +464,10 @@ func TestPing(t *testing.T) {
 			assert.Equal(t, "flipt.ping", msg.Event)
 			assert.NotEmpty(t, msg.AnonymousId)
 			assert.Equal(t, msg.AnonymousId, msg.Properties["uuid"])
-			assert.Equal(t, "1.4", msg.Properties["version"])
+			assert.Equal(t, "1.5", msg.Properties["version"])
+			if _, ok := tt.want["analytics"]; !ok {
+				tt.want["analytics"] = nil
+			}
 			assert.Equal(t, tt.want, msg.Properties["flipt"])
 
 			assert.NotEmpty(t, out.String())
@@ -507,9 +510,9 @@ func TestPing_Existing(t *testing.T) {
 	msg, ok := mockAnalytics.msg.(analytics.Track)
 	require.True(t, ok)
 	assert.Equal(t, "flipt.ping", msg.Event)
-	assert.Equal(t, "1545d8a8-7a66-4d8d-a158-0a1c576c68a6", msg.AnonymousId)
-	assert.Equal(t, "1545d8a8-7a66-4d8d-a158-0a1c576c68a6", msg.Properties["uuid"])
-	assert.Equal(t, "1.4", msg.Properties["version"])
+	assert.NotEqual(t, "1545d8a8-7a66-4d8d-a158-0a1c576c68a6", msg.AnonymousId)
+	assert.Equal(t, msg.AnonymousId, msg.Properties["uuid"])
+	assert.Equal(t, "1.5", msg.Properties["version"])
 	assert.Equal(t, "1.0.0", msg.Properties["flipt"].(map[string]any)["version"])
 
 	assert.NotEmpty(t, out.String())
@@ -577,9 +580,136 @@ func TestPing_SpecifyStateDir(t *testing.T) {
 	assert.Equal(t, "flipt.ping", msg.Event)
 	assert.NotEmpty(t, msg.AnonymousId)
 	assert.Equal(t, msg.AnonymousId, msg.Properties["uuid"])
-	assert.Equal(t, "1.4", msg.Properties["version"])
+	assert.Equal(t, "1.5", msg.Properties["version"])
 	assert.Equal(t, "1.0.0", msg.Properties["flipt"].(map[string]any)["version"])
 
 	b, _ := os.ReadFile(path)
 	assert.NotEmpty(t, b)
 }
+
+func TestTelemetryAnalyticsDisabledEmitsNull(t *testing.T) {
+	logger := zaptest.NewLogger(t)
+	mockAnalytics := &mockAnalytics{}
+	reporter := &Reporter{
+		cfg: config.Config{
+			Meta: config.MetaConfig{
+				TelemetryEnabled: true,
+			},
+			Database: config.DatabaseConfig{
+				Protocol: config.DatabaseSQLite,
+			},
+			Analytics: config.AnalyticsConfig{
+				Storage: config.AnalyticsStorageConfig{
+					Clickhouse: config.ClickhouseConfig{
+						Enabled: false,
+						URL:     "http://localhost:8123",
+					},
+				},
+			},
+		},
+		logger: logger,
+		client: mockAnalytics,
+		info: info.Flipt{
+			Version: "1.0.0",
+			OS:      "linux",
+			Arch:    "amd64",
+		},
+	}
+
+	in := bytes.NewBuffer(nil)
+	out := bytes.NewBuffer(nil)
+	mockFile := &mockFile{
+		Reader: in,
+		Writer: out,
+	}
+
+	err := reporter.ping(context.Background(), mockFile)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	msg, ok := mockAnalytics.msg.(analytics.Track)
+	require.True(t, ok)
+	fliptProps := msg.Properties["flipt"].(map[string]any)
+	analyticsProps, exists := fliptProps["analytics"]
+	require.True(t, exists)
+	assert.Nil(t, analyticsProps)
+}
+
+func TestTelemetryAnalyticsEnabledIncludesStorage(t *testing.T) {
+	logger := zaptest.NewLogger(t)
+	mockAnalytics := &mockAnalytics{}
+	reporter := &Reporter{
+		cfg: config.Config{
+			Meta: config.MetaConfig{
+				TelemetryEnabled: true,
+			},
+			Database: config.DatabaseConfig{
+				Protocol: config.DatabaseSQLite,
+			},
+			Analytics: config.AnalyticsConfig{
+				Storage: config.AnalyticsStorageConfig{
+					Clickhouse: config.ClickhouseConfig{
+						Enabled: true,
+						URL:     "http://localhost:8123",
+					},
+				},
+			},
+		},
+		logger: logger,
+		client: mockAnalytics,
+		info: info.Flipt{
+			Version: "1.0.0",
+			OS:      "linux",
+			Arch:    "amd64",
+		},
+	}
+
+	in := bytes.NewBuffer(nil)
+	out := bytes.NewBuffer(nil)
+	mockFile := &mockFile{
+		Reader: in,
+		Writer: out,
+	}
+
+	err := reporter.ping(context.Background(), mockFile)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	msg, ok := mockAnalytics.msg.(analytics.Track)
+	require.True(t, ok)
+	fliptProps := msg.Properties["flipt"].(map[string]any)
+	assert.Equal(t, map[string]any{"storage": "ClickHouse"}, fliptProps["analytics"])
+}
+
+func TestTelemetryUUIDRotatesFromPersistedState(t *testing.T) {
+	logger := zaptest.NewLogger(t)
+	mockAnalytics := &mockAnalytics{}
+	reporter := &Reporter{
+		cfg: config.Config{
+			Meta: config.MetaConfig{
+				TelemetryEnabled: true,
+			},
+		},
+		logger: logger,
+		client: mockAnalytics,
+		info: info.Flipt{
+			Version: "1.0.0",
+			OS:      "linux",
+			Arch:    "amd64",
+		},
+	}
+
+	persisted := []byte(`{"version":"1.4","uuid":"1545d8a8-7a66-4d8d-a158-0a1c576c68a6","lastTimestamp":"2024-05-10T10:00:00Z"}`)
+	in := bytes.NewReader(persisted)
+	out := bytes.NewBuffer(nil)
+	mockFile := &mockFile{
+		Reader: in,
+		Writer: out,
+	}
+
+	err := reporter.ping(context.Background(), mockFile)
+	require.NoError(t, err)
+
+	msg, ok := mockAnalytics.msg.(analytics.Track)
+	require.True(t, ok)
+	assert.NotEqual(t, "1545d8a8-7a66-4d8d-a158-0a1c576c68a6", msg.AnonymousId)
+	assert.Equal(t, msg.AnonymousId, msg.Properties["uuid"])
+}
